name: Git YOLO Linux
description: Bash snippet that defines and runs a helper to commit all current changes and push the current branch, retrying with force when a normal push is rejected.
content:
git_yolo_push() {
  set -e
  branch="$(git branch --show-current)"
  if [ -z "$branch" ]; then
    echo "Not on a branch."
    return 1
  fi

  if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
    git add -A
    if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
      git commit -m "chore: yolo update"
    fi
  fi

  if git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name '@{u}' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if ! git push; then
      git push --force
    fi
  else
    if ! git push --set-upstream origin "$branch"; then
      git push --set-upstream --force origin "$branch"
    fi
  fi

  git status --short
}

git_yolo_push
